commit.message:
docs: reorder quick start sections in README

Move "Connect to Public Hub" to the first position in the quick start
guide since it's the easiest way for users to get started. The npm
package is now published and ready to use.

Changes:
- README.md: reorder sections, add startup output example
- README.zh.md: reorder sections, add startup output example

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: summarization errors, form data loss, and auto-fill suggestions

Bug 1: Summarizer and semantic dedup now validate ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
isn't a placeholder before attempting API calls. Added detailed error
logging at every Claude API call site and the ingest summarize step.
Falls back to extractive summary gracefully when no valid key.

Bug 2: Upload form no longer clears on failure. "Try Again" resets
only the status, preserving file/text, title, type, and tags.

Bug 3: New POST /api/ingest/suggest endpoint uses Claude Haiku to
auto-suggest title, contentType, and tags from document content.
Upload page calls it on file drop or text paste and pre-fills fields.
Falls back to heuristic suggestions when no API key.

Also fixed tests to use unique content per run (RUN_ID) to prevent
collisions with leftover database data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Dashboard dark mode support
- OLT Show page responsive untuk form PON Port

feat: Configurar Playwright tests en CI/CD

**GitHub Actions Workflow:**
- Nuevo .github/workflows/playwright.yml
- Ejecuta tests en cada PR y push a main
- Soporta multi-browser (Chromium, Firefox, WebKit)
- Genera reportes HTML, JSON y JUnit
- Sube artefactos (report, screenshots, traces)
- Comenta resultados en PRs

**Configuraciones:**
- playwright.config.ci.ts - Configuración optimizada para CI
  - 2 workers en CI para mejor rendimiento
  - 2 reintentos en caso de fallo
  - Screenshots y videos solo en fallos
  - Traces en primer reintento

**Scripts nuevos:**
- npm run test:ci - Ejecuta tests como en CI
- npm run test:report - Abre reporte HTML
- scripts/test-ci.sh - Script bash para tests locales

**Documentación:**
- docs/PLAYWRIGHT_TESTS.md - Guía completa de tests
  - Cómo ejecutar tests localmente
  - Cómo escribir nuevos tests
  - Debugging y troubleshooting
  - Ver resultados y reportes

**Características:**
- Cancelación automática de runs duplicados (concurrency)
- Timeout de 60 minutos
- Setup de Node.js con cache de dependencias
- Instalación de Playwright browsers en CI
- Build de aplicación antes de tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add 180-prompt eval suite + capital cook scripts

SwarmCapital eval suite: 180 institutional-grade CRE capital markets
prompts across 11 domains and 4 difficulty tiers (Bronze→Platinum).

Domains: CRE Fundamentals, Capital Markets & Trading, Tax Structuring
(1031), Structured Finance (Mezz/Pref), Distressed Credit & Workouts,
Governance & Partnerships, PE Economics (Waterfalls), Underwriting Models,
Real Deal Case Studies, Decision Intelligence, Engine Pipeline.

Decision intelligence prompts test: credit committee, investment committee,
workout desk, distressed debt desk, and full multi-analyst pipeline.

Temporal deal evolution prompts track deals across Acquisition (2019) →
Rate Shock (2023) → Distress/Exit (2025).

Cook scripts: cre_capital_cook.py (6-stream factory, Together.ai two-tier
80B gen → 235B rewrite) and cook_platinum_mutations.py (hedge-fund
trajectory mutation engine).

commit.message:
fix: preserve Slowdown markup collections through structuring step

The structuring step was overwriting Enhancement's populated collections
(people, tags, tasks, discoveries) with empty arrays via array_merge.
Now the structuring prompt instructs the AI to carry forward input
collections, and the PHP merging logic defensively preserves non-empty
arrays from Enhancement.

Also removes dead 'type' field from OCR collections initialization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add OpenCV blue ink isolation + dilation for MCQ answer "1"

For MCQ questions with expected answer "1", the detection now includes
an OpenCV-enhanced vote alongside the 3 regular votes. The enhanced
image isolates blue ink via HSV filtering and thickens strokes with
morphological dilation, making the thin vertical "1" stroke much more
visible to the AI.

Only applies to answer "1" MCQ — other MCQ unchanged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: major feature update - email OTP auth, price comparison AI, split bills, shareable receipts

Auth:
- Replace password login with email-only OTP flow (Clerk email_code strategy)
- 2-step: enter email → 6-digit code → signed in, no password anywhere
- Auto-registers new users through same flow
- 60s resend cooldown, AnimatePresence transitions

Price Comparison AI (/prices):
- AI analyzes last 60 days of receipt items
- GPT-4o + web_search_preview finds live prices at Lidl, Biedronka, Żabka, Aldi, Kaufland
- Shows savings, promotions, buy-now alerts
- Results cached 24h in price_comparisons table
- Animated loading with cycling store messages, count-up savings animation

Split Bills / Groups (/groups):
- New DB tables: groups, group_members, expense_splits, payment_requests (migrated to Neon)
- Full CRUD API: /api/groups, /api/groups/[id], /api/groups/splits, settle endpoint
- Groups list with member avatars, emoji, currency
- Group detail: balance tracking (who owes whom), split history, settle button
- NewGroupSheet: name, emoji picker, currency, members with colored avatars
- SplitExpenseSheet: payer, equal/custom split, expense linking

Shareable Receipts (/receipt/[id]):
- Public page (no auth) styled like a real receipt
- Share button with clipboard copy + QR code in expense view
- Print-optimized CSS

Enhanced Receipt Pipeline:
- Review step after OCR: see all items, AI-suggested categories with confidence scores
- Edit item names and categories before saving
- Auto-creates receipt record if not provided
- AI enrichment via gpt-4o-mini per scanned file

UI/UX improvements:
- Global keyboard shortcuts (? help, g+key navigate, n add expense)
- Dark/light mode toggle in sidebar
- Mobile sticky header with hamburger + theme/language switchers
- Onboarding flow for new users (3-step cards)
- Branded 404 and error pages
- SQL COUNT(*) for dashboard receipts query
- Recharts lazy-loaded via next/dynamic
- 110+ new i18n translation keys
- Consistent category colors via lib/category-colors.ts (hash by ID)
- Security: auth guards added to ocr-receipt and convert-heic routes
- CSV export on expenses page with date range filter and sortable columns

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Voeg Op Maat (Wijsmakers) sectie toe aan acteurskant

- Nieuwe detail-sectie met foto-carousel (10 foto's)
- Nav-button Op Maat tussen Showreel en Repertoire
- wslide() JS functie voor carousel navigatie
- NL + EN i18n strings voor Op Maat sectie
- Logo-factuur SVG en PNG toegevoegd

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Backend improvements: deploy blocking, proposal forwarding, root cleanup

- Add prompt eval gate to CI workflow and Railway build
- Forward local-prefixed waitpoint proposals to canonical endpoint
- Improve simulation test runner with better error handling
- Add clarification fallback routing test
- Add repo inventory and runtime reference docs
- Clean up Codex task tracking files

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Replace innerHTML string concatenation with safe DOM construction in Admin.html

Fixes 5 XSS vulnerabilities by replacing innerHTML assignments with textContent:
1. Reservations table - Use DOM appendChild with textContent for all user data
2. Members table - Build rows dynamically with safe textContent assignment
3. Payments table - Create elements instead of concatenating HTML strings
4. Applications table - Iterate through data and append safe DOM nodes
5. Application detail modal - Completely rewrote openApplicationDetail() to use DOM construction

All user-controlled data (names, emails, references) now goes through textContent
instead of innerHTML, preventing XSS injection attacks. Static HTML (badges, buttons)
continues to use innerHTML since it contains only constant strings.

commit.message:
Force scroll-to-top with requestAnimationFrame loop on refresh

Uses a rAF loop for 1.5s after page load to continuously force
scroll to top, overriding any browser scroll restoration attempts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace custom QR library with CDN qrcode-generator@1.4.4

Custom QR implementation produced non-scannable QR codes. Shir Glassworks
uses qrcode-generator from CDN and produces scannable QR codes. Now Label
Keeper loads the same CDN library and delegates to it, with fallback to
the custom implementation if CDN fails to load.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Upgrade AI summary: Sonnet model, system prompt, robust cleanup

- Switch from Haiku to Sonnet for better consistency
- Split prompt into system message (rules) + user message (data)
- Add 7d/14d deltas and trend direction to score data
- Robust preamble stripping for "Based on..." / "Here is..." patterns
- Rules: respect trend data, no predictions, no filler, all 4 markets required

Expand cipher vocabulary from 10 types to 8 categories with 30+ techniques

Cryptography, Positional Extraction, Cross-Reference, Steganographic,
Pattern Recognition, Semantic/Contextual, Elimination, Map-Spatial.
Adds INSTRUCTIONS guidance requiring category variety across weeks.
Renderer unaffected (never dispatches on cipher type).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix daily challenge streak not counting the first completed day

The streak was only incremented during day transitions in
initDailyChallenges, so the first day of completing all challenges
would show streak 0 instead of 1. Now sets streak to 1 and
lastCompletedDate immediately when all challenges are completed.

commit.message:
feat: add formation snap — orbs arrange into circle, spiral, grid, or wave patterns

Press [ or tap the new Formation Snap button to smoothly animate all orbs
into geometric formations. Each press cycles to the next shape. Orbs spring
toward their targets over 400ms, hold for 3 seconds, then release back into
normal physics. Plays into the most popular interactions (creating many orbs
and watching them interact).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: beginner-friendly stats — no more cryptic abbreviations

Replace all single-letter units (K, R, M) with human-readable formats:
- Temperature: show Celsius (cards) or Kelvin + Celsius (detail)
- Radius/Mass: relative to Earth, with Jupiter for large planets
- Period: hours/days/years with context for extremes
- Distance: always light-years, never parsecs
- Star stats: × Sun instead of R☉/M☉/L☉

commit.message:
feat: add initial Claude Code configuration template set

議論 → ドキュメント → TDD の開発スタイルに最適化した設定ファイル群を追加。

**agents/**
- architect, planner, doc-updater, tdd-guide, code-reviewer,
  security-reviewer, refactor-cleaner の7エージェントを追加
- モデル選択: architect/planner=opus, tdd-guide/code-reviewer/
  security-reviewer/refactor-cleaner=sonnet, doc-updater=haiku

**rules/**
- common/ (coding-style, development-workflow, git-workflow,
  patterns, security, testing) を追加
- typescript/ (coding-style, patterns, security, testing) を追加
- python/ (coding-style, patterns, security, testing) を追加
- security.md に Agent Sandboxing・External Content Safety セクションを追加

**skills/**
- verification-loop, database-migrations, python-patterns,
  python-testing の4スキルを追加

**hooks/**
- quality-gate.js: Edit/Write 後にフォーマット・Lint を自動実行
- post-edit-typecheck.js: .ts/.tsx 編集後に型チェックを実行
- pre-bash-git-push-reminder.js: git push 前に確認メッセージを表示

**settings.json**
- hooks 設定と permissions.deny リスト（~/.ssh, ~/.aws 等）を含む
  .claude/settings.json テンプレートを追加

**install.sh**
- typescript / python / both を選択してインストールするスクリプトを追加
- rules・skills・hooks・settings.json を対象プロジェクトへコピー

**その他**
- CLAUDE.md: プロジェクト指示テンプレート（日本語応答・状態管理込み）
- PROJECT_STATUS.md: Claude が自律更新するプロジェクト状態ファイル（日本語）
- README.md: 全体構成・導入手順・各要素の違いを日本語で説明
- .gitignore: reference/ をトラッキング対象外に設定

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add full PRD to CLAUDE.md + fix Agent Teams autonomy

- CLAUDE.md в сценарии теперь содержит полный PRD:
  функциональные требования веба и бота, промпты, правила
- Agent Teams: убрано ручное указание агентов — Claude сам распределяет
- Обновлена реплика к CLAUDE.md — объясняет роль PRD

feat: false positive city tracking + simplified zone status

False Positive (FP) Alert tracking:
- collect.py / backfill.py: new city_fp_count field in data.json.
  When a מבזק flash warning converts to a real rocket/drone alert,
  any city listed in the flash but absent from the actual alert is
  counted as a false positive for that city.
  FP rate = city_fp_count[city] / flash_cities[city].
- Flash tab: new '🎭 False Positive Alerts' section shows (when data
  is available): 5 stat cards, top-20 FP city bar chart (FP count vs
  total flash appearances), sortable/filterable FP rate table with
  colour-coded rates (red ≥75%, yellow ≥50%, green <50%).

Zone Status simplification:
- Removed the Warm (7-day) tier; now just Hot (alert in last 24h)
  and Quiet (no alert in last 24h).
- Zone grid now shows ALL 30 regions (hot first, then quiet by
  recency) with a Hot/Quiet count summary row.
- Legend updated accordingly.

Fix backtest zero-results and frontend UX issues

Backtest fixes (root cause: signals never exceeded 0.6 confidence):
- Fetch real funding rates from Binance REST API during backtest
- Estimate open interest from volume for non-zero regime features
- Add backtest_mode to SignalEngine: skip MTF penalty, lower
  confidence threshold to 0.3 (no real 15m/4h data in backtest)
- Clear signal cooldowns BEFORE generating signals, not after
- Lower correlation agent minimum from 2 to 1 other asset
- Apply same fixes to walk-forward optimizer sub-backtest

Frontend UX fixes:
- Fix loading logic: AND → OR in dashboard and engine pages
  (was showing incomplete data when only one store loaded)
- Fix leverage display: remove erroneous x100 multiplier
- Add toast import and kill switch error notification (config page)
- Add CSV export guard for empty trades (trades page)
- Fix fill price display: show "market" instead of "$0.00" for null

commit.message:
Fix hold-to-drive, add time-based odometry fallback

- Fix button hold: add _cmd_repeater thread that re-sends the active
  drive command every 150ms, preventing the PICO:EDs 400ms safety
  timeout from stopping motors while a key is held

- Add time-based dead reckoning fallback: when encoder ticks never
  change, estimate pose from commanded direction + time + SPEED_MMPS_AT_MAX;
  switches to encoder mode automatically when real ticks appear

- Track last serial command via monkey-patched link.send() so both
  keyboard and navigator commands feed the odometry fallback

- Add SPEED_MMPS_AT_MAX = 350 to config.py

- Add Odometry.push_delta() for direct pose injection

- Improve _odom_updater: try-except, 5s heartbeat, encoder_online flag

commit.message:
Merge Phase 4: Piper Preprocessing Integration

**Summary:**
Complete implementation of Piper preprocessing system for Japanese TTS,
transforming phonetized data into Piper-ready training format.

**Components Delivered:**

**Phase 4a - Config & Stats Infrastructure:**
- PiperConfigGenerator: config.json with custom phonemes (15 tests, 100%)
- AudioStatsCalculator: normalization statistics (12 tests, 95%)

**Phase 4b - Transformation Infrastructure:**
- PiperPreprocessorAdapter: CSV → JSONL (14 tests, 94%)

**Phase 4c - Application & CLI:**
- preprocess_japanese_dataset use case: 6-phase orchestration (13 tests, 100%)
- CLI script: scripts/preprocess_piper.py

**Total Test Coverage:**
- 54 tests passing (15 + 12 + 14 + 13)
- Quality gates: ✅ ruff ✅ mypy ✅ pytest
- 100% coverage on application layer
- 95%+ coverage on infrastructure

**Key Features:**
- Custom hiragana → phoneme ID mappings in config.json
- Audio normalization statistics calculation
- JSONL format (line-delimited JSON) for training data
- Fail-fast validation and error handling
- Deterministic outputs
- Sample rate support: 16000 or 22050 Hz

**File Structure:**
\`\`\`
piper_voice/infrastructure/piper/
├── config_generator.py        # Piper config.json generation
├── audio_stats.py             # Audio normalization stats
└── preprocessor_adapter.py    # CSV → JSONL transformation

piper_voice/application/
└── preprocess_japanese_dataset.py  # Complete pipeline orchestration

scripts/
└── preprocess_piper.py        # CLI interface

training/ (outputs)
├── dataset.jsonl              # Training data
├── config.json                # Piper config with custom phonemes
└── audio_norm_stats.json      # Normalization parameters
\`\`\`

**Usage:**
\`\`\`bash
# Step 1: Phonemize (Phase 3)
python scripts/phonemize_japanese.py \\
  --input dataset/metadata.csv \\
  --output dataset/metadata_phonemes.csv \\
  --phoneme-map dataset/phoneme_map.json

# Step 2: Preprocess for Piper (Phase 4)
python scripts/preprocess_piper.py \\
  --input-metadata dataset/metadata_phonemes.csv \\
  --phoneme-map dataset/phoneme_map.json \\
  --audio-dir dataset/wav \\
  --output-dir training/ \\
  --sample-rate 22050

# Step 3: Train with Piper (Phase 5 - to come)
python -m piper_train --dataset-dir training/ ...
\`\`\`

**Next Phase:** Piper training pipeline integration and monitoring

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(phase4c): Add preprocessing application layer and CLI

Phase 4c Application & CLI - Complete Preprocessing Pipeline

**New Application Use Case:**

 - 6-phase preprocessing orchestration:
1. Validate inputs (metadata, phoneme map, audio directory)
2. Load phoneme map from JSON
3. Transform CSV → JSONL (via PiperPreprocessorAdapter)
4. Calculate audio normalization stats (via AudioStatsCalculator)
5. Generate config.json with custom phonemes (via PiperConfigGenerator)
6. Return all output paths

**Components:**

1. **PreprocessConfig** (value object)
   - Input paths: metadata, phoneme map, audio directory
   - Output directory + sample rate

2. **PreprocessResult** (result object)
   - Success status
   - Statistics: total samples, phoneme count
   - Output paths: dataset.jsonl, config.json, audio_norm_stats.json

3. **preprocess_japanese_dataset()** (use case)
   - Orchestrates all preprocessing infrastructure
   - Fail-fast error handling
   - Deterministic outputs

**CLI Script:**

`scripts/preprocess_piper.py` - Command-line interface:
- Argument parsing for all inputs
- Progress logging (6 phases)
- Error reporting with context
- Next steps guidance
- Help/examples

**Test Results:**
- 13 tests passing (use case)
- 100% coverage on application layer
- 54 total tests for Phase 4 (15 + 12 + 14 + 13)
- Quality gates: ✅ ruff ✅ mypy ✅ pytest

**Usage:**
```bash
python scripts/preprocess_piper.py \
  --input-metadata dataset/metadata_phonemes.csv \
  --phoneme-map dataset/phoneme_map.json \
  --audio-dir dataset/wav \
  --output-dir training/ \
  --sample-rate 22050
```

**Outputs:**
- `training/dataset.jsonl` - Training data (audio + phoneme IDs)
- `training/config.json` - Piper config with custom phonemes
- `training/audio_norm_stats.json` - Normalization parameters

**Phase 4 Complete:**
- Infrastructure: Config generator, Audio stats, Preprocessor adapter
- Application: Complete preprocessing use case
- CLI: User-friendly script with validation
- 54 tests, 95%+ coverage on new code

**Next:** Merge to main, ready for Piper training integration

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix fiscal calendar: year starts at week 1, not last Sunday of March

The 4-4-5 calendar was starting the fiscal year at ISO week 13 (late
March), putting week 49 in Period 9 instead of Period 12. The fiscal
year actually aligns with the calendar year (ISO week 1), giving:
  P12 = weeks 48-52 (correct)
  P11 = weeks 44-47
  P13 = week 53 in 53-week years

Simplified implementation: no date arithmetic or cross-year boundary
handling needed since fiscal year = calendar year.

fix: 未登録Secretの空文字列でデフォルト値が効かない問題を修正

GitHub ActionsはSecretが未登録の場合に空文字列を渡すため、
os.environ.get()のデフォルト引数が機能しなかった。
_split()内で空文字列チェックを追加してdefaultにフォールバックするよう修正。
